titleEn: Pig livability: Metric that drives everything else
titleZh: 猪只存活率：驱动一切的关键指标
summaryZh: 本文从世界猪肉博览会出发，深入探讨猪只存活率如何悄然影响饲料效率、生长性能、生产成本及整个生猪生产系统的稳定性。值得畜牧从业者关注，以优化管理、提升效益。
contentHtml: From World Pork Expo, we sit down with Alltech’s Dr. Jose Soto to unpack why livability is the metric that quietly drives everything else: feed efficiency, growth performance, cost of production, and the stability of your whole pork production system.
